prompts.title: Blister Pack - Male
prompts.promptContent: A full-body collectible action figure of a modern young woman, showcased in its original blister-pack display. Rendered in a detailed 3D toy aesthetic, the figure is presented in a sleek, contemporary package designed to appeal to today’s collector culture. At the top of the packaging, the name @ai.mismatch is boldly featured in stylish, modern typography—setting the tone for a fashionable and tech-savvy persona. The figure wears a fresh and energetic ensemble: a loose-fitted yet flattering top, casual pants, and adorable sneakers. Her casually chic hairstyle adds to her dynamic, on-the-go vibe. Tucked neatly inside the blister pack alongside the figure are must-have accessories for any digital creator: a stylish backpack, a smartphone, wireless earbuds, a laptop, and a camera—everything she needs to create, connect, and share. The backing card design embraces a minimalist, polished look with smooth colour gradients and integrated social media icons, giving it a clean, professional finish. Near the bottom, subtly incorporated into the layout, is the label: Digital Creator, adding a final touch of identity and purpose. Realistic rendering with studio lighting ensures a crisp, high-quality visual that highlights both the packaging and the figure itself.

prompts.title: Prompt Library
prompts.promptContent:
Build a Prompt Library in html. Features must include the following
1) Simple technologies like html, css and javascript
2) Import and export button to store the data in json for backup
3) Categories filter with CRUD - Generative, Agentic, Coding, Chat
4) Content Type filter CRUD - Image, Video, Audio, App
5) Design: Charcoal dark theme, modern, rounded corners, good spacing, animations
6) CRUD functions for Prompts
7) Copy button on each prompt card that copies the prompt to the clipboard
8) New item fields - time, date, title, category, content type, prompt, tags
9) Sorting option for newest, oldest, a-z, z-a
10) Text search
11) When the application start it must land on the dashboard filtered from newest to oldest as default..
12) Animated background of soft slow moving circles rising up the screen, have a Background toggle to switch this on and off, status must save.

prompts.title: Hoam Loan Calculator
prompts.promptContent:
You are an expert web developer. Build a home loan calculator in html and review your code for errors, broken tags and unnecessary text comments before giving it to the user.  Use the frontend designer skill for design. Do not add comments into the script.

Features must include the following
1) Simple technologies like html, css and javascript
2) Input fields must be sliders
3) Loan Amount slider range 1 million to 30 million, default value 5 million
4) Interest Rate slider range 1% to 30%, default value 10%
5) Loan Term range 5 years to 50 years, default 30 years
6) Design is a dark theme of greys, use animations, round corners, accent colour is a pastal light blue
7) Big bold font displaying the total interest to be repaid and monthly repayment amount
8) Realtime calculation when sliders are adjusted
9) App heading in bold uppercase reads "Home Loan Calculator"
10) Currency is in South African Rands, round off amounts with no decimals
11) Animated background of soft slow moving circles rising up the screen, have a Background toggle to switch this on and off, status must save.
12) The home loan panel should have an animation where it slides up a little when the page loads.

prompts.title: AI Dashboard
prompts.promptContent:
You are an expert web developer.
Build an AI Dashboard in html.
Review your code for errors, broken tags and unnecessary text comments before giving it to the user. 
Use the frontend designer skill for design. 

Features must include the following
1) Simple technologies like HTML, CSS and JavaScript
2) Design is a dark theme of greys, use animations, round corners, accent colour is a pastel light blue.
3) App heading in bold uppercase reads "AI Dashboard"
4) Add an animated background of soft circles that slowly float from the bottom of the page upwards, must not be too distracting.
5) Research the current top 6 AI companies and their top LLM model.
6) Display the 6 companies with their logos and give a summary of why they are at the top.
7) List their models below the companies panel in a chart with a list of their advantages.
8) Under the models panel display the top 10 models for this month on Huggingface using a bar chart with the number of downloads.

prompts.title: Kings Chess
prompts.promptContent: Two faceless, king-like figures draped in elegant, flowing robes, one in gold and the other in silver , sit across from each other at an ornate marble table, playing chess. They wear tall, crystal crowns with gems, symbols of authority long corrupted. Behind them rises a grand, decaying royal hall: towering pillars, shattered stained-glass windows, faded red carpets, and torn royal banners. The light is soft and cold, filtering through cracks in the ceiling. Dust floats in the air like forgotten memories. Their movements are slow, deliberate — as if each move will decide the fate of empires.

prompts.title: Food Platter
prompts.promptContent: Image is a vibrant and colorful food photography style, featuring a large, round platter artfully arranged with a variety of fresh fruits and vegetables. The layout is circular, with slices of mango, kiwi, radish, cucumber, and strawberries radiating outward. In the center, there are clusters of raspberries, blackberries, and blueberries, adding depth and contrast. The platter is garnished with leafy greens and small bunches of red grapes. Surrounding the main platter are smaller bowls containing additional fruits and nuts, enhancing the composition. The text 'BAD RIB EVENT' is prominently displayed in the center, styled in an elegant, serif font with a gold color, slightly arched to follow the platter's curve. The background is a wooden table, adding a rustic touch to the overall presentation.

prompts.title: Jesus
prompts.promptContent: A realistic, cinematic depiction of Jesus Christ on the cross during the crucifixion, wearing a crown of thorns, with gentle but sorrowful eyes looking toward the heavens, blood and sweat on his face, nail wounds visible on his hands and feet, a warm golden light breaking through dark storm clouds above, symbolizing hope and salvation, realistic human proportions, dramatic lighting, high detail, 8K resolution, painterly yet lifelike style, respectful and reverent tone.

prompts.title: Asian Women
prompts.promptContent: Ultra-detailed portrait of a stunning Asian goddess with long, flowing jet-black hair streaked with violet strands that shimmer like falling dusk. Her eyes are dark with glowing crimson pupils—mysterious, unreadable, and magnetic. She wears elegant myth-tech armour crafted from obsidian plates and dark chrome, interlaced with iridescent filigree and shifting runes. Her armour design is sleek, sharp, and asymmetrical—part ceremonial, part weaponized. Veins of red and violet energy pulse beneath its surface. A dark anti-grav mantle trails behind her, flickering like ink in zero gravity. Her crown is a broken crescent of black energy, rotating around her head like a fractured halo. The environment is a twilight domain: shattered mirror skies, inverted constellations, and massive pillars of dark light rising from the abyss. Her stance is graceful but lethal—one foot forward, blade in hand, ready to strike or vanish. She radiates divine menace with elegance and restraint. Shot on RED Komodo X, 85mm lens, f/1.4, ISO 100. VFX pass: halo shimmer bloom, ambient lens flare, light pulse from floor glyphs.

prompts.title: Arctic Explorer - USSR
prompts.promptContent: A hyper-realistic, cinematic photograph in the style of 1970s Soviet, depicting a lone Soviet Arctic explorer struggling through an intense blizzard, flying snow particles as the setting sun tries to pierce through the swirling storm. The explorer is clad in a bulky, worn, and weathered retro-futuristic spacesuit, with faded red and white accents and a prominently displayed CCCP insignia across the chest. His suit is covered in frost and ice, battered by the harsh Arctic conditions, with snow clinging to the edges and joints. The blizzard is fierce, with snow and ice particles violently flying through the air, obscuring the landscape and making the explorer’s journey even more treacherous. The air is thick with whipping snow, which interacts with the faint light from the setting sun, casting dim, golden beams that struggle to penetrate the storm. The light creates fleeting, volumetric shafts through the blizzard, catching on the swirling snowflakes and illuminating the scene in brief, ghostly flashes. Despite the fading light and harsh conditions, the explorer presses on toward a barely visible lunar lander, half-buried under the snow. His steps are slow and heavy, with snow building up around his legs as he fights against the wind. The worn spacesuit shows signs of prolonged use, with cracks in the visor fogging over, and his breath visible inside the helmet. Snow particles whip violently around him, catching the last of the day’s light, while patches of golden sunlight filter through the blizzard, giving a surreal and fleeting glow to the harsh, frozen landscape. The setting sun casts long, dramatic shadows across the snow-covered ground, but the intensity of the storm continually threatens to snuff out the light, making the environment feel overwhelming and unforgiving. The blizzard is relentless, with snow and ice clinging to the explorer’s spacesuit, and the setting sun adds a feeling of urgency, as if time is running out. The last beams of sunlight interact with the flying snow particles, creating a flickering effect, with the light constantly shifting and fading as the explorer marches forward. The mood is one of isolation and survival, heightened by the combination of the setting sun’s faint warmth and the cold, brutal storm. The explorer’s worn gear and the harsh, shifting light emphasize the clash between nature’s fury and human endurance, while the retro-futuristic design of the spacesuit and equipment ties the scene back to a 1970s Soviet sci-fi aesthetic

prompts.title: Task Manager
prompts.promptContent:
Create an html based Task Manager with the following features.
1) Simple technologies like html, css and javascript
2) Import and export button to store the data in json for backup, position is the very bottom of the left menu.
3) Default landing page is a Dashboard listing at the top 4 cards in different colour for total active, completed, categories and people. Below that are 2 columns listing completed tasks vertically and on the right column all the high priority tasks active listed vertically.
4) Menu is a bar on the left listing Dashboard, Tasks, Categories, People, Archive and New Task.
5) Task page lists all active tasks
6) Task page has a sorting function for newest, oldest, a-z, z-a, priority high - low, priority low - high
7) Task page has 2 rows of selectable filters - categories and people to filter tasks.
8) People has full CRUD capabilities.
9) Categories has full CRUD capabilities.
10) Tasks have full CRUD capabilities, completed tasks are shifted from tasks to archive. Changing the completed status of tasks in the archive moves them back to active tasks.
11) Animated background of soft slow moving circles rising up the screen, have a Background toggle to switch this on and off, status must save. Position for the toggle is just above the import export button on the left menu.
12) High priority tasks listed on the dashboard are full cards with all details and can be marked completed, edited and deleted. Show all active high priority tasks.
13) Recently completed tasks on the dashboard are full cards with all details and can be changed back to active, edited and deleted. Show only the 10 most recent.

prompts.title: Weather App
prompts.promptContent:
Create a weather forecast app where you can enter a town and get the forecast with icons. Design in a charcoal dark theme.

Use the free non-commercial API at Open-Metro, docs are here https://open-meteo.com/en/docs?latitude=-33.9346&longitude=18.8668#api_documentation

1) Have an icon to favorite and save towns, unselecting or selecting a favorite must update in realtime.
2) Icon to select a default town for the dashboard which loads when the app refreshes. This value must save.
3) Include the current weather in the header section - current temp, todays high and low, todaysrain, todays uv, todays wind, todays sunrise and sunset.
4) In a row below that include the hourly focasts, which is scrollable with the mouse wheel. Include the data in the hourly cards. Includes temp, rain, wind.
5) Below that in a new row show the 7 day forecast - high and low temps, rain
6) Include a background of soft and slow rising circles, include a toggle to switch this background animation on/off, must also save state.
7) At the very top a search for towns.

prompts.title: Web Tools
prompts.promptContent:
1) Create a web tools app, name the header the same.
2) Create a horizontal menu and the first menu item is called Placeholders.
3) The Placeholders page contains inputs for image width and height, background & foreground colour, extension and a text value.
Extension dropdown has 3 types - jpg, png, gif
4) The forground and background inputs must be a colour selector that populates the web hex value.
5) Clicking a button call Generate it will call an API at https://dummyimage.com, review the page for API requirements.
6) The returned image will be displayed with a copy and download buttons, the copy must copy as a png to avoid browser errors.
7) Dark charcoal them with rounded corners
